Global (All).title: Russia's Ukraine invasion: NATO leaders warn of potential Russian false-flag operation
Global (All).summary: NATO leaders have issued a stark warning over a potential Russian false-flag operation in eastern Ukraine, which they say would be a clear breach of the Minsk agreements.

Global (All).title: Global Economic Outlook: World faces $13 trillion hit from climate change by 2050
Global (All).summary: Global economic output will be 13% lower than it would be otherwise by 2050 due to the effects of climate change, the World Bank has warned in a damning report. This figure is up from $10 trillion in a similar report published two years earlier.

Global (All).title: UK’s spy chief warns of global threat from cyber attacks
Global (All).summary: The UK’s spy chief, Jeremy Fleming, has warned of a growing threat to global stability from increasingly sophisticated cyber attacks and espionage operations, which are being conducted by nation-states and other actors.

United States.title: Uvalde Texas Shooting Victims' Families Sue School District and Law Enforcement
United States.summary: The families of the victims of the Uvalde school shooting are suing the school district and police officers who responded to the attack, alleging negligence and misconduct.

United States.title: House Votes to Hold Steve Bannon in Contempt for Defying Jan. 6 Subpoena
United States.summary: The House of Representatives voted to hold Steve Bannon in contempt for defying a subpoena related to the January 6th attack on the US Capitol.

United States.title: Justice Department to Appeal Dismissal of Trump Organization's Tax Case
United States.summary: The Justice Department announced it will appeal a judge's decision to dismiss the case against the Trump Organization for allegedly evading taxes.

South Korea.summary: No significant security, political, or social risks were reported in South Korea over the past 7 days.
North Korea launched a ballistic missile test on 4 July 2024, sparking tensions in the region. (Note: This event may not be directly related to South Korea, but it has regional implications.)
Protests were held in Seoul on 5 July 2024 to oppose government plans to increase taxes on low-income households.

Japan.title: Protest in Tokyo against nuclear power plants
Japan.summary: Thousands of protesters took to the streets in Tokyo on July 17th to demand the shutdown of Japan's nuclear power plants due to safety concerns.

Japan.title: North Korea launches missile over Japan
Japan.summary: On July 17th, North Korea launched a missile that flew over Japan, prompting a public warning and triggering emergency sirens in Japan.

Japan.title: COVID-19 cases surge in Japan due to BA.5 variant
Japan.summary: Japan has seen a recent surge in COVID-19 cases due to the spread of the BA.5 variant, leading to concerns about the country's healthcare system.
